content: ICM curiosity-driven exploration can be re-calibrated to actively test the working memory capacity limits of large language model agents during reasoning, turning curiosity from a general exploration tool into a targeted diagnostic and mitigation mechanism for LLM reasoning bounds. This creates a self-aware agent that can proactively pause, chunk, or offload reasoning tasks when it detects its own working memory is reaching capacity.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
